title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. Capesize Spike Fades as Market Balance Loosens - The recent rally that pushed spot Capesize rates to the $30,000 mark is beginning to lose steam, with signs of weakness emerging in the Pacific market.
